title: App listing editing panel - Timeframe?
excerpt: Hello, some time ago I stumbled upon an article about an upcoming panel in the app management section that would allow devs to edit marketplace listings. Now I kind of lost that article. Does someone have news on this?

posts.author: a.arcifa (Andrea Arcifa)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, some time ago I stumbled upon an article about an upcoming panel in the app management section that would allow devs to edit marketplace listings. Now I kind of lost that article. Does someone have news on this?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @a.arcifa,

You might be referring to this thread! Either way, it should be soon (potentially around next week)

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: a.arcifa (Andrea Arcifa)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @rachelatmonday,

Thanks for replying.

Unfortunately your link leads me to a 404. Maybe the thread has been hidden for some reason?

image1018×411 29.3 KB

I hope it’s not because of the feature being cancelled or delayed!

Cheers,
Andrea

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @a.arcifa,

That is a closed section in the community. That is why you don’t see the topic.

If you have an app in the marketplace, I can get you into that section

If you would like that, please fill out this form mentioning this community topic and that you spoke with me and let me know the email address you want to add, what is your app’s ID and the ID of the account in which the app was created.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Matias.Monday this is fantastic! I jumped on the opportunity and submitted a form as well
